title: build(deps): bump github.com/openshift/imagebuilder from 1.2.4-0.20230309135844-a3c3f8358ca3 to 1.2.4
body:
Bumps [github.com/openshift/imagebuilder](https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder) from 1.2.4-0.20230309135844-a3c3f8358ca3 to 1.2.4.
Release notes

Sourced from github.com/openshift/imagebuilder's releases.

v1.2.4

What's Changed

  • dispatcher: honor default builtin-args while processing FROM --platform= by @​flouthoc in openshift/imagebuilder#224
  • conformance: test non-root USER before WORKDIR by @​nalind in openshift/imagebuilder#222
  • dispatcher: consider builtinargs and userargs while processing baseImage name by @​flouthoc in openshift/imagebuilder#229
  • dockerclient: fix COPYing an archive to a new location by @​nalind in openshift/imagebuilder#233
  • dispatcher, builder: filter args against allowedArgs while processing FROM, ADD and RUN by @​flouthoc in openshift/imagebuilder#232
  • add,copy: fix error message expecting at least two arguments by @​flouthoc in openshift/imagebuilder#236
  • system: use containers/storage for LCOW validation by @​flouthoc in openshift/imagebuilder#246
  • Bump to Go 1.19 by @​nalind in openshift/imagebuilder#245
  • Switch to golang native error wrapping by @​saschagrunert in openshift/imagebuilder#240
  • Use containers/storage/pkg/regexp to better handle init regex by @​rhatdan in openshift/imagebuilder#239
  • TestBuilder(): be able to expect errors by @​nalind in openshift/imagebuilder#244
  • dockerclient: implement COPY --chmod by @​nalind in openshift/imagebuilder#249
  • dockerclient: don't quietly ignore --mount by @​nalind in openshift/imagebuilder#248
  • env,unset: support syntax ${VAR_NAME:?} to error on unset vars by @​flouthoc in openshift/imagebuilder#243
  • builder,dispatcher: support inline --network in RUN statements by @​flouthoc in openshift/imagebuilder#247

New Contributors

  • @​saschagrunert made their first contribution in openshift/imagebuilder#240

Full Changelog: https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/compare/v1.2.3...v1.2.4

Commits
  • See full diff in compare view

[![Dependabot compatibility score](https://dependabot-badges.githubapp.com/badges/compatibility_score?dependency-name=github.com/openshift/imagebuilder&package-manager=go_modules&previous-version=1.2.4-0.20230309135844-a3c3f8358ca3&new-version=1.2.4)](https://docs.github.com/en/github/managing-security-vulnerabilities/about-dependabot-security-updates#about-compatibility-scores) Dependabot will resolve any conflicts with this PR as long as you don't alter it yourself. You can also trigger a rebase manually by commenting `@dependabot rebase`. [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-start) [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-end) ---
Dependabot commands and options
You can trigger Dependabot actions by commenting on this PR: - `@dependabot rebase` will rebase this PR - `@dependabot recreate` will recreate this PR, overwriting any edits that have been made to it - `@dependabot merge` will merge this PR after your CI passes on it - `@dependabot squash and merge` will squash and merge this PR after your CI passes on it - `@dependabot cancel merge` will cancel a previously requested merge and block automerging - `@dependabot reopen` will reopen this PR if it is closed - `@dependabot close` will close this PR and stop Dependabot recreating it. You can achieve the same result by closing it manually - `@dependabot ignore this major version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this major version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this minor version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this minor version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this dependency` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this dependency (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself)

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **NOT APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *dependabot[bot]* **Once this PR has been reviewed and has the lgtm label**, please assign ashley-cui for approval. For more information see [the Kubernetes Code Review Process](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process). The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fbuildah).
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - **[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/main/OWNERS)** Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
Should this be closed in favor of https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/4666 ?

OK, I won't notify you again about this release, but will get in touch when a new version is available. If you'd rather skip all updates until the next major or minor version, let me know by commenting `@dependabot ignore this major version` or `@dependabot ignore this minor version`.

If you change your mind, just re-open this PR and I'll resolve any conflicts on it.
